description: EAD Factory MCP — Digital Trust services APIs for your agents
name: io.github.g-digital-by-Garrigues/ead-factory

environmentVariables.description: Full flow base email — used to compose participant emails (user+signatory@domain, etc.)
environmentVariables.name: FULL_FLOW_EMAIL_BASE

environmentVariables.description: TCP port for the HTTP transport. Used only when TRANSPORT=http; ignored in stdio mode.
environmentVariables.name: HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Okta application client secret. See https://eadtrust.example.com/onboarding for credential acquisition.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: OAuth scope requested. Defaults to 'token' if not provided.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_SCOPE

environmentVariables.description: Okta token endpoint (client_credentials grant). Used both for outbound API calls and for verifying inbound Bearer tokens in HTTP mode.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_TOKEN_URL

environmentVariables.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for the evidence-status check.
environmentVariables.name: POLL_INTERVAL_MS

environmentVariables.description: Maximum polling attempts before timing out the evidence-status check.
environmentVariables.name: POLL_MAX_ATTEMPTS

environmentVariables.description: Transport: "stdio" for local Claude Code, "http" for remote deployment with auth
environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT
